creator: rik@FreeBSD.org
text:
The http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors.html page need to be update on request of owner of http://linux-distro.co.uk resource. He asks to add the resource to that page.

Fix: 

Add the http://linux-distro.co.uk resource to the page http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/mirrors.html.
